categories.info: Configure speed and emulation hacks. Can cause rendering errors!
categories.label: Hacks

options.info: Unstable.
options.label: Fast Memory

options.info: Slower, less lag.
options.label: Force Real Clock Sync

options.info: Some games require ejecting/inserting the Memory Stick.
options.label: Memory Stick Inserted

options.info: 'Automatic' will use the frontend language.
options.label: Game Language

options.info: 'Automatic' will use the frontend video driver. Core restart required.
options.label: Backend

options.info: Slow, accurate. Core restart required.
options.label: Software Rendering

options.info: Core restart required with Vulkan.
options.label: Rendering Resolution

options.info: Vulkan only. Core restart required.
options.label: MSAA Antialiasing

options.info: Remove one line from top and bottom to get exact 16:9. Core restart required with Vulkan.
options.label: Crop to 16x9

options.info: Can make framerate smoother in games that run at lower framerates.
options.label: Render Duplicate Frames to 60 Hz

options.info: Notify frontend.
options.label: Detect Frame Rate Changes

options.info: GL/Vulkan only, slower, less lag, restart.
options.label: Buffer Graphics Commands
Analog Circle vs Square Gate Compensation

options.info: Additional deadzone to apply after frontend input.
options.label: Analog Deadzone

options.info: Additional sensitivity factor to apply after frontend input.
options.label: Analog Axis Scale

options.info: Faster, but nothing may draw in some games.
options.label: Skip Buffer Effects

options.info: Some games require GPU readbacks, so be careful.
options.label: Skip GPU Readbacks

options.info: Faster, but can cause text problems in a few games.
options.label: Lazy Texture Caching (Speedup)

options.info: Only used by some games, controls smoothness of curves.
options.label: Spline/Bezier Curves Quality

options.info: Reduces artifacts.
options.label: Lower Resolution for Effects

options.info: Combine skinned model draws on the CPU, faster in most games.
options.label: Software Skinning

options.info: Uses hardware to make curves.
options.label: Hardware Tesselation

options.info: CPU heavy, some scaling may be delayed to avoid stutter.
options.label: Texture Upscaling Level

options.info: Fixes visual banding glitches in upscaled textures.
options.label: Texture Deposterize

options.info: Vulkan only, overrides 'Texture Scaling Type'.
options.label: Texture Shader

options.info: Gets rid of some visual artifacts caused by unnecessary texture filtering in some 2D games, by switching to nearest filtering.
options.label: Smart 2D Texture Filtering
